## Riot Relay 1.4.2

This release fixes two rank-history regressions, adds a proper master-password change flow, cleans up how friend activity and presence are shown in chat, and improves chat readability.

### Rank history
- League/TFT past-season history no longer disappears on normal refreshes. OP.GG's regular per-account summary endpoint often omits history rows even on a successful call; previously that empty result silently overwrote the richer history captured during first sync. Verified history is now kept whenever a refresh comes back with no history, not only when the refresh fails outright.
- VALORANT past-act rank history is fixed for all accounts, including the currently signed-in one. The act-name lookup was querying valorant-api.com's `/seasons/competitive` endpoint, which never contained act/episode display names — it was pointed at the wrong endpoint from the start. It now queries `/seasons`, which has the real act names, so every past season resolves to a label again instead of being silently dropped.

### Security
- Changing the vault master password now requires re-entering the current password and repeating the new one, matching the same confirmation pattern used when a vault is first created. The current password is verified against the vault's derived key before anything changes.

### Friend activity and presence
- VALORANT activity no longer shows "In queue" next to a live round score. A live score now always means the match is in progress and is shown as "In match", even if Riot's own party-state flag hasn't caught up yet.
- Friends showing Riot's "Do Not Disturb" status while queued, in champ/agent select, or in a match now show as Online instead — that status is not something they chose, it's just Riot marking them busy while playing.
- The friend presence dot and status badge now change color by what stage of play a friend is actually in: green while idle in the lobby, blue while queued or in champion/agent select, and a brighter blue while a match is live.
- All League/TFT profile buttons (OP.GG, U.GG, DeepLoL, DPM.LOL) are now always shown in chat for friends, matching the account page, instead of only appearing once a friend happens to be observed playing League.

### Chat readability
- Larger avatars, presence dots, and friend names; higher-contrast message text and header; clearer spacing throughout the friend list and message thread.

### Validation
- All 78 automated tests pass.
- JavaScript syntax checks and diagnostics pass on all changed files.
- Pack build verified.

### Downloads
- **EXE / NSIS:** recommended for normal installation and automatic updates.
- **MSI:** intended for managed or manual deployment.
- `SHA256SUMS.txt` contains SHA-256 hashes for published assets.

Riot Relay is unofficial community software and is not endorsed by Riot Games.
